questions.q: On May 4, 2026, which video game retailer made an unsolicited $55.5 billion takeover offer for the e-commerce firm eBay?
questions.correctText: GameStop made the massive offer, proposing $125 a share and aiming to cut $1.2bn in eBay's sales and marketing spending.

questions.q: According to a recent revelation by former Nintendo of America President Reggie Fils-Aimé, which major e-commerce company previously asked Nintendo to break the law with illegal financial support?
questions.correctText: Reggie Fils-Aimé stated that Nintendo stopped selling to Amazon after the retailer demanded illegal financial support to undercut Walmart's prices.

questions.q: Following the closure of their studio in early 2026, former employees of which Ubisoft studio branch recently announced the launch of a new independent developer called besszong?
questions.correctText: Former Ubisoft Halifax workers formed the indie studio besszong, with plans to create a multiplayer party game.

questions.q: Which strategy game recently reached the milestone of selling 500,000 copies in less than 72 hours of its release?
options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: "Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era" achieved 500,000 copies sold within its first three days on the market.

questions.q: Which classic fox-masked kunoichi character was recently revealed in a new gameplay trailer as the first DLC fighter for Season 3 of Tekken 8?
questions.correctText: Kunimitsu was announced as the first DLC character of Tekken 8's Season 3 Character Pass.
